actions.instruction: Are you stuffing or mailing unstuffed?
actions.sourceText: If stuffing: slightly overstuff with Poly-fil, do not close hole, tuck tail into Knocker. If mailing unstuffed: leave hole open and yarn tail outside.

sourceText: If stuffing: slightly overstuff with Poly-fil, do not close hole, tuck tail into Knocker. If mailing unstuffed: leave hole open and yarn tail outside.
title: Stuff or leave open

warnings.message: A choice is required for stuffOrMail.
